full_text:
Lü An (Zhongti) 呂安 (仲悌)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü An (呂安), styledZhongti (仲悌), was born in Dongping commandery. A strong character and reformer. Close friend of Ji Kang. Executed by Sima Zhao. Lü An was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Lü An lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
